parameters.query: SELECT pf.id, pf.lead_id, pf.transcript_text, pf.filename, lcm.lead_name, lcm.curators FROM processed_files pf LEFT JOIN lead_chat_mapping lcm ON lcm.lead_id = pf.lead_id WHERE pf.status = 'completed' AND COALESCE(pf.summary_sent, false) = false AND pf.transcript_text IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pf.created_at DESC LIMIT 20

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ parse_mode: 'HTML', chat_id: $json.chatId, text: '📊 Нет новых созвонов для отчёта. Все уже были отправлены или ещё не обработаны.' }) }}

parameters.query: WITH prompt AS (SELECT prompt_text FROM prompts WHERE name = 'report_prompt' AND is_active = true ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT prompt_text FROM prompt), '') AS prompt_text

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.GLM4_MODEL || 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022', system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.combined }], max_tokens: 1500 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ parse_mode: 'HTML', chat_id: $json.chatId, text: $json.text, disable_web_page_preview: false }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'error' THEN 1 END) as errors, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 END) as today FROM processed_files
SELECT lead_id, lead_name, curators, active FROM lead_chat_mapping ORDER BY lead_id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ parse_mode: 'HTML', chat_id: $json.chatId, text: $json.text, disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ parse_mode: 'HTML', chat_id: $json.chatId, text: $json.text, disable_web_page_preview: false }) }}
